message:
refactor(circuit-breaker): hoist error string conversion outside permit guard

Move the conditional to_string() conversion for the failure predicate outside
the permit guard's if-let block. Previously, the AllErrors optimization (skip
heap-allocating e.to_string() when record_failure won't inspect it) was
interleaved with the permit ownership check, duplicating the record_failure
call. Now the error string is computed once before the guard check, and a
single record_failure call handles both paths. Functionally equivalent but
reduces branching and makes the control flow clearer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
